items.caption: A stylized illustration of a flour bag and a spoon, both rendered in a blue and white color scheme. the flour bag is depicted with a textured appearance, suggesting the granular nature of flour, and the word "flour" is prominently displayed in bold, capital letters. the spoon is shown with a handle and a bowl, and it is positioned to the right of the flour bag. the background is a solid, bright yellow color, providing a high-contrast backdrop that makes the blue and white elements stand out. the overall style of the image is cartoonish and appears to be designed for a clean, graphic look, possibly for use in a culinary context or as part of a branding design.
